channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Nikola Jokic has 31 points, 22 assists and 21 rebounds in Nuggets' 149-141 OT win over Suns
item.description: Nikola Jokic had 31 points, 21 rebounds and a career-high 22 assists and the Denver Nuggets outlasted the Phoenix Suns 149-141 in overtime Friday night after losing a 21-point lead.
item.dc:creator: Michael Kelly, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Kessler pulls down 25 rebounds in Jazz loss at Toronto
item.description: TORONTO (ABC4 Sports) - Walker Kessler set a career high with 25 rebounds, to go along with a team-high 18 points and a career-high eight blocks, but it wasn't enough to prevent another loss by the Utah Jazz, who fell at Toronto Friday night, 118-101.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: A's announce 3-year Las Vegas sponsorship as club looks toward future move
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The Athletics will play in Northern California for at least the next three seasons, but will also represent their future home in Las Vegas and brought four of their star players to drive home that point.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Raiders acquire quarterback Geno Smith from Seahawks for a 3rd-round pick, AP source says
item.description: HENDERSON, Nev. (AP) — The Las Vegas Raiders answered their most pressing personnel question of the offseason Friday by acquiring quarterback Geno Smith in a trade with Seattle and reuniting him with his former coach, a person with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Clippers' James Harden delivers clear six-word response after stellar scoring performance
item.description: James Harden delivered a strong performance during the Los Angeles Clippers latest victory as the team tries to secure a playoff spot down the stretch.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Knicks star Jalen Brunson expected to miss at least 2 weeks with right ankle sprain
item.description: Jalen Brunson is expected to miss at least two weeks with a right ankle sprain, putting the New York Knicks in a tough spot as they try to maintain their position in the Eastern Conference.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Rantanen dealt to Dallas, lands 8-year contract; Panthers add Marchand at NHL trade deadline
item.description: Mikko Rantanen went back West — but with the Dallas Stars this time following a brief stint in Carolina. And Bruins captain Brad Marchand is leaving Boston after 16 seasons to join the defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW and STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NJ's top pitcher Sophia Bordi joins elite college program
item.description: NEW JERSEY (PIX11) -- It's time to meet our athlete of the week, and she's one of the best to ever play high school softball in New Jersey -- ace pitcher Sophia Bordi.
item.dc:creator: Perry Sook, PIX 11

item.title: Florida Panthers add veteran Brad Marchand as they gear up for run at another Stanley Cup title
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) — The Florida Panthers welcomed the arrival of Boston Bruins captain Brad Marchand in a Friday trade that adds even more grit and experience to the roster of the defending Stanley Cup champions.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shane Lowry likes it tough and builds a 2-shot lead at Bay Hill
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Shane Lowry loves the grind of a strong test and it's showing at Bay Hill. He had six birdies Friday in slightly tamer conditions for a 5-under 67, giving him a two-shot lead going into the weekend at the Arnold Palmer Invitational. It wasn't as cold as the day before.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Falcons' Kirk Cousins visits President Trump at White House
item.description: President Donald Trump and Atlanta Falcons quarterback Kirk Cousins met in the Oval Office at the White House Friday and posed for a photo to remember it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Raiders land Geno Smith in blockbuster trade with Seahawks: reports
item.description: In a blockbuster trade, the Seattle Seahawks dealt veteran QB Geno Smith to the Las Vegas Raiders, and he'll reunite with head coach Pete Carroll.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lake Placid awaits word on whether it'll be picked as the Olympic sliding site for 2026 Games
item.description: LAKE PLACID, N.Y. (AP) — Picture this: A sliding athlete wins an Olympic medal in Lake Placid next winter, then is chauffeured down to New York for an award ceremony at Rockefeller Center a few days later with thousands of people there to cheer on both moments. It could happen.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ingrid Andress says she felt like 'America's punching bag' after drunk national anthem performance
item.description: Ingrid Andress reflected Thursday on her botched national anthem performance at the 2024 MLB Home Run Derby, which she admitted to performing while drunk.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: IOC’s Bach sees ‘new world order’ ahead of LA Olympics and says Trump will 'fully support' Games
item.description: LAUSANNE, Switzerland (AP) — Thomas Bach says he feels a rare calm in his final weeks as IOC president even as a “new world order" gains speed ahead of the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump to sign executive order establishing White House Task Force for 2026 FIFA World Cup
item.description: President Donald Trump will sign an executive order Friday establishing a White House Task Force for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, which will take place in the U.S., Canada and Mexico, a White House official told Fox News Digital.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: For some athletes, Olympic sliding in Lake Placid or Italy would both have comforts of home
item.description: LAKE PLACID, N.Y. (AP) — Emily Sweeney is certain of having a home Olympics next winter. The USA Luge veteran is marrying fellow luge athlete Dominik Fischnaller later this year. He’s from Italy. She’s an American who lives in Lake Placid.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Second lady Usha Vance will lead presidential delegation at Special Olympics World Winter Games, Trump says
item.description: President Donald Trump is turning to Usha Vance, the wife of Vice President JD Vance, to fill an important role for this year’s Special Olympics World Winter Games.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Stephen A. Smith agrees to new deal worth at least $100 million with ESPN: report
item.description: Stephen A. Smith and ESPN have reportedly agreed to keep the longtime journalist at the network for another five years in an extension worth at least $100 million.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jaguars release Pro Bowl tight end Evan Engram; cap cuts continue: reports
item.description: Evan Engram was the Jacksonville Jaguars' latest cap casualty Thursday. He was released after the trade of Christian Kirk to the Houston Texans.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Reports: Bears trade for all-pro Chiefs OL Joe Thuney
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears have reportedly traded for four-time Super Bowl champion guard Joe Thuney from the Chiefs. According to multiple reports, the Bears are sending back a 2026 fourth-round pick for the 32-year-old guard.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: BYU wins double-overtime thriller over #10 Iowa State
item.description: AMES, Iowa (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 23 points and No. 23 BYU outlasted No. 10 Iowa State 88-85 in double overtime Tuesday night for its seventh consecutive victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Donovan Mitchell scores 28 and NBA-best Cavs beat Bulls 139-117 for 11th straight win
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored 28 points, Jarrett Allen added 25 points and 17 rebounds, and the NBA-best Cleveland Cavaliers won their 11th straight game, 139-117 over the Chicago Bulls on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Baseball: Santa Fe Christian 3. Valhalla 2
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Baseball first game of the season for Santa Fe Christian who won a low scoring game against Valhalla 3-2. Eagles were paced by sophomore Kyle Plasman, young man was on a good one out the gate, 3 for 4 with three doubles. A fantastic pitching performance by senior Kam Lohse.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC officials denounce homophobic chant heard at inaugural home match
item.description: "What took place during our first-ever home match does not reflect who we are as a club or the values we stand for," SDFC officials said in a statement Monday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Jordan Howlett, of the Fast Foods Secrets Club, returns to Oceanside High School
item.description: You may have seen Oceanside alum Jordan Howlett before while scrolling through your social media feed. Telling his over 25 million viewers on Instagram and TikTok to, "Come here," before he reveals the secret recipes of everyone's fast food favorites as part of his Fast Food Secrets Club.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Celtics honor Somerset teen who saved choking girl
item.description: Ben Courville, a junior firefighter with the Dighton Fire Department, saved a girl last summer from choking at a Fall River restaurant.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: First female NBA scout talks trailblazing for Women's History Month
item.description: Laflin was previuosly a cheerleader for three professional sports teams, had a recurring role in "Baywatch" and worked as a model.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Foul! Cavaliers guard Ty Jerome blasts officials after whistle-happy crew calls 53 fouls
item.description: Upset with an inordinate number of personals called during Cleveland's 133-129 overtime win against Portland on Sunday, Jerome didn't hold back in criticizing the officiating crew — zeroing in on referee Natalie Sago.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Nesmith scores a career-high 27 points to lead Pacers past Bulls 127-112
item.description: Aaron Nesmith scored a career-high 27 points, Pascal Siakam added 20 and the Indiana Pacers defeated the Chicago Bulls 127-112 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Naomi Girma is injured on her Chelsea debut after world record transfer
item.description: Naomi Girma, women’s soccer's first million-dollar player, was injured and substituted on her Chelsea debut on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU wins sixth straight, cruising past West Virginia
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fousseyni Traore recorded the 21st double-double of his career on Saturday evening as No. 25 BYU defeated West Virginia 77-56 in front of a sold-out Marriott Center. “It was an ultimate tale of two halves," head coach Kevin Young said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Connor Zilisch's 'not smart' moves lead him to victory at Focused Health 250 in Austin
item.description: Zilisch shrugged off early and late trouble to capture the checkered flag in the NASCAR Xfinity Series Focused Health 250 on Saturday at Circuit of the Americas. It's his second career win on NASCAR's second circuit.
item.dc:creator: Grace Reader, Fox 5

item.title: RSL shuts out Seattle in MLS home opener, 2-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Having scored just one goal in its first three games of the 2025 campaign, Real Salt Lake got some help from the Seattle Sounders on its way to a 2-0 victory in its MLS home opener Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USU gets smacked by Colorado State, 93-66
item.description: FORT COLLINS, Colo. (ABC4 Sports) - This is not the way the Utah State basketball team was hoping to go into the postseason. The Aggies suffered its worst loss of the season, losing by 27 points to Colorado State Saturday afternoon, 93-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Power struggles on 44th birthday as he begins IndyCar season seeking a Penske contract extension
item.description: Will Power had a rough 44th birthday Saturday when he lost power in his car, brushed the wall during practice and had his hybrid engine changed before qualifying for IndyCar’s season-opening race.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Angelo Posada, The Titan of the Titans
item.description: "Those who stay will be champions" - that's the motto of Poway Wrestling; one they adopted from Michigan Football under that was adopted under legendary head Coach Bo Schembechler. That motto rings true for the five-time state champion Titans, who have won 44 CIF SDS titles in the last 47 years.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5
